name: node-for-own
title: node-for-own
summary: Iterate over the own enumerable properties of an object
description:
Iterate over the own enumerable properties of an object
Iterate over the own enumerable properties of an object, and return an object
with properties that evaluate to true from the callback. Exit early by
returning `false`. JavaScript/Node.js.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-for-own because Iterate over the own enumerable properties of an object.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-for-own as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-for-own with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-for-own --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
